description: Interpolation, easing, and spring utilities -- interpolate(), spring(), all named easing functions (linear, ease_in, ease_out, ease_in_out, ease_out_cubic, ease_in_out_cubic) per Section 8.5. Must specify whether these utilities are shared between Node.js (scene sequencer transition timing) and browser (camera interpolation) contexts, and the sharing mechanism (isomorphic module, duplication, or build-time inclusion in page bundle).
notes: Tier 0 foundation. No dependencies. Math primitives used by every camera path and transition.
